29.reason: C89/C90 standard does not allow variable declaration inside for-loop initialization; declare j before the loop.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.25 , reason:  Out-of-bounds access: a and b are only defined for indices 0..i-1; j<=i accesses a[i] and b[i] which are uninitialized (should be j<i)
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  C89/C90 standard does not allow variable declaration inside for-loop initialization; declare j before the loop.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Off-by-one error: i stores the number of terms in the first polynomial, so valid indices are 0 to i-1. j<=i accesses out-of-bounds uninitialized array elements.
